prompt: A dark green chalkboard that has been partially erased/cleaned with visible chalk residue and smudges where content used to be. Large handwritten chalk text in Ukrainian Cyrillic letters in the center: 'ЦЕ ВСЯ ТЕОРІЯ' on the first line and 'ПЕРЕХОДИМО ДО ПРАКТИКИ' on the second line. The text should look like it was written with white and yellow chalk in a casual handwritten style. Some faded mathematical formulas and ghostly outlines of the previous content (including faint outlines of winged elephants) visible in the erased areas. The chalkboard has a wooden frame and the overall mood is like a teacher just erased the lesson and wrote a transition message.
